{"society_power": 1.5, "state_power": 4.5, "society_change": 0.3, "state_change": -1.5, "key_event": "Copper crash and Shaba invasions hollow out the state", "reasoning": "Economic collapse, Zairianization fallout, IMF dependence, and reliance on foreign troops during the Shaba invasions turned Mobutu's regime into a \"Paper Leviathan\"\u2014still coercive but administratively hollowed, dropping state power. Society ticked up slightly via informal survival networks and the emergence of the UDPS opposition, though repression kept it weak."}
